page_metadata.biotools__summary: AutoClass is a deep learning tool for scRNA-Seq data cleaning and denoising. AutoClass integrates two deep neural network components, an autoencoder and a classifier, as to maximize both noise removal and signal retention.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AutoClass is a deep learning tool for scRNA-Seq data cleaning and denoising. AutoClass integrates two deep neural network components, an autoencoder and a classifier, as to maximize both noise removal and signal retention.
